pull_requests.title: feat: Migrate user endpoints to GraphQL
pull_requests.description: This PR migrates all user-related endpoints from REST to GraphQL. Includes schema definitions, resolvers, and mutations for user CRUD operations. Breaking change: REST endpoints /api/v1/users/* will be removed.

pull_requests.title: feat: JWT authentication with RSA signing
pull_requests.description: Implements JWT token generation and validation using RSA-256. Includes refresh token rotation and token blacklisting.

pull_requests.title: refactor: Payment processing module cleanup
pull_requests.description: Initial cleanup of the payment processing module. Extracting shared logic, improving error handling.

pull_requests.title: feat: Add notification service scaffolding
pull_requests.description: Setting up the new centralized notification service. Redis-backed deduplication, support for push, email, and SMS channels.
